---
title: "Diana Carolina Acosta-Rojas"
---

### Plant ecologist · Conservation scientist

I am a plant ecologist working at the interface of research and conservation. My work explores seed ecology, plant-animal interactions and ecosystem functioning in tropical ecosystems, with the aim of informing science-based conservation strategies. I currently coordinate conservation projects across Latin America as part of the Millennium Seed Bank Partnership at the Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew.
